description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a minimalist design. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and plush for comfort. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and padded, aligning with the backrest for a cohesive look. The upholstery is a solid, medium-gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle stitching along the seams. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs, slightly recessed and finished in a dark color, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. Overall, the design is contemporary and versatile, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, gray two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, loose cushions, and block-style legs. The upholstery is smooth and matte, giving it a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat and two back cushions, straight padded armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight armrest, the thickness of the cushions, and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the back profile of the armrests and cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest and cushion depth from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a simple, rectangular profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed, with a dark finish and a sturdy, minimalistic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions, no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and subtle seam stitching, no visible decorative patterns or tufting.
